Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 6}Occasionally, you will encounter {f 0 1 2}one-way teleporters{f 0 1 27} in the Abyss of Time that can be used to return to the Desert of Doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Keep in mind that, since these teleporters are only one-way, {f 0 1 2}you cannot return to the same floor where it was used{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
